build.name: AlignMD
build.summary: Two-sided healthcare staffing platform — clinicians (NP/PA/MD/DO/CRNA) matched to facility jobs by a credential-aware, rule-based match score.
build.next_action: Provision the Supabase project — run ~/Documents/alignmd/provision.sh and paste the Management API token.

phases.name: Security foundation
phases.detail: Data model (~18 tables), audit-trail triggers, and row-level security written as Supabase migrations. Next.js app skeleton scaffolded. Awaiting Supabase project provisioning.

phases.name: Provider CRM core
phases.detail: Provider profiles, credential tracking, 30/60/90-day expiry alerts, permissioned document upload, activity log, pipeline board.

phases.name: Jobs + Matching
phases.detail: Facility/job profiles, procedure catalog, the rule-based match score. End of Phase 2 = a working MVP.

phases.name: Provider intake & onboarding
phases.detail: Self-service application/survey, CV builder, verified references, shift-based availability blocks.

phases.name: Verification & screening
phases.detail: Background check, malpractice check, reference verification, richer credentialing timeline.

phases.name: State license assistant
phases.detail: Survey-driven, per-state license application helper that pre-fills from uploaded documents.

phases.name: Reporting, comms & scale
phases.detail: Submissions/fills/time-to-fill reporting, SMS + email outreach, search hardening.

decisions_pending: SSN storage — recommendation: do not store the full SSN
Malpractice data — store in-platform vs reference the result only
Verification model — manual coordinator workflow vs vendor integration
Provider logins in the MVP, or recruiter-only until Phase 3
Compact / IMLC handling in the match logic
